An exhibition showcasing representative paintings of German artist Rolf Lukaschewski is held at the Beijing Olympic Museum to pay tribute to the Olympic Games. /CFP

As athletes from around the world compete at the Summer Olympics in Paris, an Olympic-themed painting exhibition is being held at the Beijing Olympic Museum to honor both the summer and winter editions of the Olympic Games. The exhibition, named "Tribute to Excellence: Olympians from Ancient Greece to Modern Times," showcases representative paintings of German artist Rolf Lukaschewski. The artworks convey his interpretation of the Olympic movement and the enduring legacy of the Olympic spirit, highlighting ancient Olympic sports and athletes from the Summer and Winter Olympics.
